newsignuppage-recruited: $1 is a URL to the recruited user's user page; $2 is the recruited user's username. This message is displayed on Special:UserActivity and on the output of <siteactivity> tag on wikis where the [[mw:Extension:SocialProfile|SocialProfile extension]] is installed and site administrators have chosen to give out points for recruiting new users; not used on normal wikis
newsignuppage-loginform-birthdate:
Label for the birth date field shown on Special:CreateAccount.
Parameter:
* $1 is the minimum age required for adult-reader access.
Note: the field accepts YYYY-MM-DD and MM/DD/YYYY formats.
newsignuppage-loginform-age-honesty: Label for the checkbox where the user confirms they were honest about their age.
newsignuppage-loginform-tos: The text for the new checkbox which is displayed in Special:CreateAccount, right below the "Remember my login on this computer" checkbox. Parameters: * $1 is the full URL to the site's terms of service page, configurable via the $wgNewSignupPageToSURL global variable * $2 is the full URL to the site's privacy policy page, configurable via the $wgNewSignupPagePPURL global variable * $3 is the minimum age required for adult-reader access.
newsignuppage-must-accept-tos: Error message displayed to the user in Special:CreateAccount in a fancy red <div> if they don't check the "I accept the Terms of Service" checkbox
newsignuppage-must-confirm-age: Error message displayed if the user does not confirm that they were honest about their age.
newsignuppage-invalid-birthdate: Error message displayed if the submitted birth date is not a valid date.
